findings.description: uv export --frozen --require-hashes as vendor image replacement. 3-stage build eliminates version matrix coordination (P14/P15). Lockfile is authoritative; hashes provide supply chain verification.
findings.proposedRule: When packaging Python monorepo packages for Docker, prefer uv export over vendor base images.

findings.description: Python stdlib version guards: sys.version_info at module level for cross-version imports (tomllib 3.11+ vs tomli 3.10). mypy natively understands version guards but not try/except.
findings.proposedRule: For stdlib modules that differ across supported Python versions, use sys.version_info guards at module level.

findings.description: Non-root USER in Dockerfile runtime stages must come after all COPY/RUN file operations. Placing before COPY causes silent permission errors.
findings.proposedRule: USER directive MUST appear after all COPY, RUN, and file-creation commands but before WORKDIR and CMD.

findings.description: Make backslash continuation preserves leading whitespace, breaking Python indentation in one-liners. Needed 3 debug cycles to resolve.
findings.proposedRule: Python commands in Makefile recipes MUST be single-line. Never use backslash continuation.

findings.description: Docker extras pattern: [project.optional-dependencies] docker for runtime-only dependencies (dagster-webserver, daemon, k8s). uv export --extra docker includes them; uv sync excludes them.
findings.proposedRule: Runtime-only dependencies should use optional-dependencies extras, not top-level dependencies.

findings.description: Deterministic count assertions: 12 instances of >= N where == N was correct. Recurring finding across WU-6, WU-8, WU-11, WU-12 — the #1 most-recurring gate-tests finding.
findings.proposedRule: When expected count is deterministic, ALWAYS use == N, never >= N or > 0.
